pageContext.name: Three Kingdoms Generals Ma Chao (Colored Edition)
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Infinity Studio are proud to bring you the Three Kingdoms Generals Ma Chao (Colored Edition) Statue!  Presented in a grand and highly detailed 1:7 scale form, this dynamic resin statue of Ma Chao atop his lavishly decorated horse joins the ranks of the Three Kingdoms Generals series. This entry into the series is a stunning work of craftsmanship from designer Quan and sculptor Qin Xianghua.  Included with the Ma Chao statue is a war banner to complement and display alongside the General.  For admirers of fine art and tributes to historical figures, this Ma Chao statue is a perfect addition to your collection!
